ddls:
CREATE TABLE "PostalCodes" (
  "postalcode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each postal code */,
  "postalcode" TEXT /* The postal code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the postal code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("postalcode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "Boroughs" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borough */,
  "borough" TEXT /* The borough */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the borough */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "Neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* The neighborhood */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "LocationTypes" (
  "location_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location type */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* The location type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "Locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "postalcode_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the PostalCodes table */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the Boroughs table */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the Neighborhoods table */,
  "location_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the LocationTypes table */,
  "street_name" TEXT /* Street name of the location */,
  "building_number" TEXT /* Building number of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "Coordinates" (
  "coordinate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coordinate */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the Locations table */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coordinate_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each postal code
Unique identifier for each location type
Foreign key referencing the PostalCodes table
Foreign key referencing the Boroughs table
Foreign key referencing the Neighborhoods table
Foreign key referencing the LocationTypes table
Foreign key referencing the Locations table
